title: rangium suspensum
intro: Rangium suspensum, also known as desert rose or adenium obesum, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Rangium suspensum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and aid in the management of diabetes. Herbal preparations of Rangium suspensum can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
